sections.paragraph:
constr. מַעְיַן and poet. with Vav parag. מַעְיְנֹו Psa 114:8 with suff. מַעְיָנֹו Hos 13:15 plur. מַעְיָנִים constr. מַעְיְנֵי, and מַעְיָנֹות, constr. מַעְיְנֹות m. denom. from עַיִן with Mem formative.

(1) a place irrigated with fountains, Psa 84:7 (compare as to this place under the word בָּכָא).

(2) a fountain itself, i.q. ·עַיִן (Syr. ܡܥܝܺܢܐܳ id.) Gen 7:11 8:2 . Metaph. it appears to indicate the greatest joy, pleasure, delight, Psa 87:7.
